data.title: Frequently Asked Questions
data.subtitle: Everything You've Been Wondering About, Answered in One Convenient Place

items.question: Who owns the videos created with Visiomate?
items.answer: You do — 100%. Every video generated through Visiomate belongs entirely to you, including full commercial rights. All projects are encrypted and stored safely. Only you have access to your videos and assets.

items.question: Do I need video editing experience to use it?
items.answer: You do — 100%. Every video generated through Visiomate belongs entirely to you, including full commercial rights. All projects are encrypted and stored safely. Only you have access to your videos and assets.

items.answer: You do — 100%. Every video generated through Visiomate belongs entirely to you, including full commercial rights. All projects are encrypted and stored safely. Only you have access to your videos and assets.
